scripts.vercel-build: pnpm --filter @baret/guard build && pnpm --filter @baret/wallet-adapter build && pnpm --filter @baret/ui build && VITE_ANALYZE_URL=/api VITE_WALLET_URL=https://baret.example/wallet pnpm --filter @baret/showcase build && WALLET_BASE=/wallet/ VITE_ANALYZE_URL=/api pnpm --filter @baret/wallet build && rm -rf apps/showcase/dist/wallet && cp -r apps/wallet/dist apps/showcase/dist/wallet
